specs.notes: Primary spec for MambaConfig — must reflect unification of driver/config.rs duplicate into this canonical struct
Driver spec — must note removal of duplicate MambaConfig from driver/config.rs, driver/config.rs now only holds CompilerConfig

context_notes: The unification of dual MambaConfig structs (#1134) merges the richer config/schema.rs format into the canonical single struct. driver/config.rs now only contains CompilerConfig (backend, emit, opt_level, project_config). MambaConfig is imported from crate::config::MambaConfig. The flat format (entry_point at root, crates as HashMap<String, String>) is preserved via CrateEntry::Version variant and top-level expose HashMap for backward compatibility.
